finding: 117 moved component files (63 kit/, 54 shadcn/) + barrel + testIds registry: per-file diff vs HEAD shows 0 non-import differing lines (22 byte-identical, 95 import-only). Component bodies byte-for-byte; only @/… specifiers rewritten kit-relative. Barrel differs only in a line-1 doc comment.

Grep of sdk/packages/kit/src for `from '@/`, `import('@/`, Stores., @/core, @/modules, @/api-client, @ziee/framework, @ziee/ui-core returns zero real hits (one Stores. is a doc comment in div-scroll-y.tsx). The kit names no app type/store/alias — fully domain-agnostic.

The one genuine domain coupling was kit/dialog.tsx -> DivScrollY -> Stores.AppLayout.nativeScroll (an app module store). Severed: app DivScrollY stays app-side unchanged (19 usages intact); the kit ships a store-free div-scroll-y whose non-nativeFlow render path is identical. dialog never passes nativeFlow, so output is equivalent. Reported per the gate's 'if something couples it to a domain module, report it'.

cn (lib/utils.ts), useIsMobile (hooks/use-mobile.ts), DivScrollX (internal/div-scroll-x.tsx) vendored into the kit as diff-identical copies of their app originals; app keeps its own copies unchanged. Kit owns its pure micro-deps rather than importing @/. Confined to 3 tiny pure files, not divergent copies of MOVED-slice files.

Per-directory relative rewrites: from kit/ -> ../shadcn/X, ../lib/utils, ../hooks/use-mobile, ../internal/div-scroll-*; from shadcn/ -> ./X (sibling), ../lib/utils, ../kit/X. Zero `@/` imports remain in the kit tree. All relative depths correct (files at src/kit or src/shadcn, one level under src).

tsc --traceResolution proved the exports wildcard `./*: ./src/*` maps @ziee/kit/kit/theme -> ./src/kit/theme but tsc does NOT append .tsx (extensionless exports target), so deep subpaths failed while the barrel resolved. Fixed with consumer `paths` (@ziee/kit + @ziee/kit/*) in both tsconfigs — the same split the repo already uses for @ziee/ui-core. Package exports retained for runtime bundlers (which do append extensions).

Every third-party lib the kit imports is declared in the kit package.json deps (base-ui, @radix-ui/react-slot, cva, clsx, tailwind-merge, lucide-react, sonner, vaul, overlayscrollbars(+react), @tanstack/react-virtual, react-hook-form, @hookform/resolvers, react-day-picker, date-fns, input-otp, embla-carousel-react, cmdk, next-themes, zod) at versions matching ui/package.json; react/react-dom are peers; @types/* + typescript are devDeps. Kit standalone tsc = 0.

All three gates exit 0: `cd sdk/packages/kit && tsc --noEmit` = 0; `cd src-app/ui && tsc --noEmit` = 0; `cd src-app/desktop/ui && tsc --noEmit` = 0. This chunk touches no route/type/schema, so the E8 openapi/types golden does not apply (tsc-clean is the correct gate).

The moved slice (121 files) is git-rm'ed from src-app/ui/src/components/ui — no divergent duplicate remains in ziee (E6). Consumers repointed: 348 ui/src + 15 desktop/ui/src + 1 ui/tests file (364 import sites), quote-anchored so only import specifiers change. @ziee/kit added as a workspace dep in both consumer package.json files.

npm install at the worktree root wired node_modules/@ziee/kit -> sdk/packages/kit (symlink) and hoisted all third-party deps to the root node_modules. This is F1's second purpose: proving the sdk/packages/* npm workspaces resolve as symlinks (root package.json workspaces already lists sdk/packages/* from Chunk 0).

src/styles/tokens.css is a byte-identical extract of index.css lines 47-205 (@theme inline + :root + .dark), exposed via the ./styles/tokens.css export. ui/src/index.css (the gen:design-spec single source of truth) is UNCHANGED; the kit copy is additive + provenance-commented, so ziee's build + design-spec check are unaffected.

The kit's public surface is unchanged: the barrel src/index.ts is byte-identical (modulo the doc comment) and re-exports the same symbols; deep subpaths (@ziee/kit/kit/*, @ziee/kit/shadcn/*, @ziee/kit/testIds.generated) resolve to the same files. Consuming code sees the identical component set/props; only the import prefix changed (@/components/ui -> @ziee/kit).

The kit needed one ambient declaration (src/css.d.ts: declare module '*.css') for kit/scroll-area's side-effect CSS import, which ziee gets from vite/client. Kit tsconfig adds allowImportingTsExtensions for table-view-core.test.ts's `.ts`-extension import and node/react/react-dom types. No other adjustment; kit tsc is warning-free.

Out of the tsc gate: ui/scripts/{gen-kit-manifest,gen-testid-registry,classify-gallery-coverage}.mjs still scan src/components/ui, so the full `npm run check` sub-gates check:kit-manifest/check:testid-registry would need their scan roots repointed to the kit. Explicitly out of scope for F1's tsc-clean gate; does not affect tsc --noEmit. Noted in BOUNDARY + DRIFT-1.8.
